/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/order_execution_tests.dir/test/test_order_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/order_execution_tests.dir/test/test_conflict_resolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/order_execution_tests.dir/test/test_portfolio_guard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/order_execution_tests.dir/test/test_arb_coordinator.cpp.o -o order_execution_tests  _deps/spdlog-build/libspdlog.a lib/libgtest_main.a -lpthread lib/libgtest.a
